extruders.name: Clockwork1
extruders.description: Direct drive extruder for the Voron Afterburner toolhead.

extruders.name: Clockwork2
extruders.description: Direct drive extruder for the Voron Stealthburner toolhead, IDGA supported.

extruders.name: Pocket Watch
extruders.description: Bowden extruder for Voron V0.

extruders.name: Pocket Watch Nema17
extruders.description: Bowden extruder modeled from Clockwork1.

extruders.name: Night Watch
extruders.description: Bowden extruder designed from Clockwork2 for Voron V0.2.

extruders.name: Dual Nightwatch
extruders.description: Bowden extruder, variant of Night Watch, features dual extruder design.

extruders.name: M4 Mobius
extruders.description: Bowden belt driven extruder.

extruders.name: Mini14
extruders.description: Bowden belt driven extruder, variant of M4, features smaller size and nema14 motor.

extruders.name: Wristwatch BMG
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, variant of Wristwatch G2, RIDGA supported.

extruders.name: WWBMG IDGA
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, variant of Wristwatch BMG, IDGA supported.

extruders.name: Sherpa Mini
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, RIDGA supported.

extruders.name: Sherpa Micro
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, smaller and lighter Sherpa Mini, RIDGA supported.

extruders.name: Sherpa Heavy
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, variant of Sherpa Mini, uses a nema17 with pinion gear, RIDGA supported.

extruders.name: Sherpa Extra Heavy
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, variant of Sherpa Heavy using a standard nema17, RIDGA supported.

extruders.name: Sherpa Crew Mini
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, variant of Sherpa Mini, features two sets of BMG gears.

extruders.name: Sherpa Zero
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, variant of Sherpa Mini, RIDGA supported.

extruders.name: Shepherd
extruders.description: Direct drive extruder for Archetype Breakneck part cooling duct, variant of Sherpa Mini.

extruders.name: Fz
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, variant of Sherpa Mini.

extruders.name: Miro
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, features dual-drive gears.

extruders.name: Sailfin
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder.

extruders.name: Sharkfin
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, variant of Sailfin, RIDGA supported.

extruders.name: Sharketype
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder for Archetype toolhead, variant of Sharkfin, RIDGA supported.

extruders.name: HextrudORT
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder for the HevORT toolhead.

extruders.name: Vorxtrudort
extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, variant of HextrudORT with mounting for Voron.

extruders.name: Vz HextrudORT

extruders.description: Direct drive standalone extruder, variant of ProtoXtruder, features a latch arm based on the Prusa Nextruder design.
